Article.ArticleTitle: Impact of hypoxic air quality on resistance training effect in different normobaric hypoxia environments.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Sports Training and Physical Conditioning Advances Group (GAEDAF), Faculty of Sport Sciences, University of Extremadura, Cáceres, 10003, Spain.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Competing interests: The authors have no relevant financial or non-financial interests to disclose. Ethical approval: The study protocol was approved by the Local Research Ethics Committee (PEI-BA/2018) and was conducted in accordance with the Declaration of Helsinki. Consent to participate: The participants were informed about the study protocol and signed a written informed consent form prior to investigation.
